feed.title: Genesis of Downtown Chicago Inventory Feed

entry.title: 2025 Genesis GV80 Prestige
entry.ns0:description:
Genesis of Downtown Chicago is a family-owned Genesis dealership at 2700 S Michigan Ave in Chicago, Illinois, along South Michigan Avenue in the South Loop. We serve luxury drivers across downtown Chicago and the greater Chicagoland area - including the Loop, Bronzeville, Hyde Park, Bridgeport, and the Near North Side. This 2025 Genesis GV80 Prestige is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Genesis lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an elevated, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. No Accidents! One Owner! This 2025 Genesis GV80 Prestige is finished in Makalu Gray and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Option Group 01

    Convenience

    • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

    Safety and Security

    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Hands-on cruise control with lane change - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control with lane change, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up, and helps you make lane changes. Meet your ultimate co-pilot, hands-on cruise control with lane change.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: Want more detail on this GV80, its pricing, or current Genesis offers? Reach out to Genesis of Downtown Chicago and we'll walk you through financing and trade-in options. Genesis of Downtown Chicago is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 312-588-9421 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today! 2700 S. Michigan Ave. Chicago IL 60616 Napleton Autos Online Pricing Disclaimer New vehicle inventory is offered for sale at the Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP), as set by Genesis Motor America and/or Genesis Financial. Prices labeled as the "Napleton Price" include all eligible dealer discounts and/or manufacturer incentives and do not include taxes, title, license fees, documentation fees, optional equipment, or dealer-installed accessories selected by the customer at the time of purchase. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in the displayed pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice based on manufacturer program updates, incentive eligibility, or market conditions. Napleton Autos advertises its inventory on this website, www.napleton.autos, as well as on third-party advertising platforms. Pricing is specific to each vehicle, identified by its Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and dealer stock number. The pricing shown on www.napleton.autos represents the most current and accurate pricing for Napleton Autos. In the event of any discrepancy between this website and any third-party website, the pricing displayed on www.napleton.autos will be considered the most accurate and will supersede all other advertised prices. While every effort is made to ensure the accuracy of the information on this site, errors may occur. Please verify all information with a Napleton Autos Client Advisor. You may do so by contacting us directly or visiting the dealership.

entry.title: 2026 Genesis GV70 3.5T Sport Prestige
entry.ns0:description:
Genesis of Downtown Chicago is a family-owned Genesis dealership at 2700 S Michigan Ave in Chicago, Illinois, along South Michigan Avenue in the South Loop. We serve luxury drivers across downtown Chicago and the greater Chicagoland area - including the Loop, Bronzeville, Hyde Park, Bridgeport, and the Near North Side. This 2026 Genesis GV70 3.5T Sport Prestige is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Genesis lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an elevated, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. No Accidents! One Owner! This 2026 Genesis GV70 3.5T Sport Prestige is finished in Uyuni White and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Option Group 01

    Convenience

    • Remote parking - Fit in anywhere! Remote parking system allows you to pull into or out of a space without having to be in the vehicle; simply use the remote control! It's perfect when the cars next to you are too close for you to be able open your doors. With remote parking, any spot is an open spot!
    • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

    Safety and Security

    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Android Auto & Apple CarPlay smart device wireless mirroring
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: Want more detail on this GV70, its pricing, or current Genesis offers? Reach out to Genesis of Downtown Chicago and we'll walk you through financing and trade-in options. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: Want more detail on this GV80, its pricing, or current Genesis offers? Reach out to Genesis of Downtown Chicago and we'll walk you through financing and trade-in options. Genesis of Downtown Chicago is a family-owned Genesis dealership at 2700 S Michigan Ave in Chicago, Illinois, along South Michigan Avenue in the South Loop. We serve luxury drivers across downtown Chicago and the greater Chicagoland area - including the Loop, Bronzeville, Hyde Park, Bridgeport, and the Near North Side. This 2026 Genesis GV70 2.5T Sport Prestige is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Genesis lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an elevated, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Genesis GV70 2.5T Sport Prestige is finished in Uyuni White and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Option Group 01

    Convenience

    • Remote parking - Fit in anywhere! Remote parking system allows you to pull into or out of a space without having to be in the vehicle; simply use the remote control! It's perfect when the cars next to you are too close for you to be able open your doors. With remote parking, any spot is an open spot!
    • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

    Safety and Security

    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Android Auto & Apple CarPlay smart device wireless mirroring
    Other notable features: OPTION GROUP 01, OBSIDIAN BLACK, SPORT LEATHER SEATING SURFACES, NFC KEY CARD, UP SEATBACK CARGO MAT, CARGO COVER, ROOF RACK CROSS BARS, FIRST AID KIT Want more detail on this GV70, its pricing, or current Genesis offers? entry.title: 2026 Genesis GV80 2.5T
entry.ns0:description:
Genesis of Downtown Chicago is a family-owned Genesis dealership at 2700 S Michigan Ave in Chicago, Illinois, along South Michigan Avenue in the South Loop. We serve luxury drivers across downtown Chicago and the greater Chicagoland area - including the Loop, Bronzeville, Hyde Park, Bridgeport, and the Near North Side. This 2026 Genesis GV80 2.5T is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Genesis lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an elevated, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Genesis GV80 2.5T is finished in Uyuni White and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Option Group 01

    Convenience

    • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

    Safety and Security

    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: OPTION GROUP 01, OBSIDIAN BLACK, LEATHERETTE SEATING SURFACES, FRONT & REAR MUDGUARDS, FRAGRANCE CARTRIDGE, ROADSIDE ASSISTANCE KIT, CARGO MAT, ALL SEASON FITTED LINERS, CARGO BLOCKS Want more detail on this GV80, its pricing, or current Genesis offers? Reach out to Genesis of Downtown Chicago and we'll walk you through financing and trade-in options.
